Main page app for the thrjtech.com website.

# Instructions
Currently there is only one subpage called "pdf compressor" which is a tool to compress PDF files. 

For not simple box that link to the subpage is working, you can use the following code to create a link to the subpage:

```html
<a href="https://pdf-compressor.thrjtech.com" class="btn btn-primary">Go to PDF Compressor</a>

```

Make the link look like a button by adding the class "btn btn-primary" to the anchor tag. You can customize the appearance of the button by using different classes or adding your own CSS styles.

Under the button, put some text that describes the PDF compressor tool and its features. You can also include some screenshots or examples of how to use the tool to make it more appealing to users.

# Expected UI
The main page should have a clean and simple design with a clear call-to-action button that directs users to the PDF compressor tool. The button should be prominently displayed and easy to find. Below the button, there should be a brief description of the tool and its features, along with any relevant images or examples to help users understand how to use it effectively.

# Technical Details
- Use React for building the user interface.
- Use React Router for navigation between the main page and the PDF compressor subpage.
- Use CSS for styling the components and making the UI visually appealing.
- Ensure that the website is responsive and works well on different devices and screen sizes.
